basic_details.job_title: Gujarat University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat University (GU) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Gujarat University. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the GU Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree in Sciences / Arts / Commerce (M.Sc. / M.A. / M.Com.) with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university, Postgraduate degree in Education (M.Ed.) with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university, Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or similar test like GSET, or awarded Ph.D. degree in Education as per UGC regulations
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree in Sciences / Arts / Commerce (M.Sc. / M.A. / M.Com.) with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university. Postgraduate degree in Education (M.Ed.) with minimum 55% marks from a recognized university. Cleared the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by the UGC or similar test like GSET, or awarded Ph.D. degree in Education as per UGC regulations.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gujarat University Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Gujarat University Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Gujarat University Research Assistant positions is 28 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Research Assistant position at Gujarat University. This provides a good number of opportunities for eligible candidates to secure a role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must hold a Postgraduate degree in Sciences, Arts, or Commerce (M.Sc., M.A., M.Com.) with at least 55% marks, or a Postgraduate degree in Education (M.Ed.) with a minimum of 55% marks. Additionally, clearing NET/GSET or holding a Ph.D. in Education is required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. This makes the application process more accessible to a wider range of candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for Gujarat University Research Assistant jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the Gujarat University Research Assistant positions is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it out, and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Research Assistant positions at Gujarat University are contractual in nature. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as specified in the appointment letter.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Gujarat University located?
faq.answer: Gujarat University is located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. The recruitment is for positions within this university.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary details for the Research Assistant position are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information regarding the stipend or salary.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxations for the Research Assistant positions. Candidates should consult the official notification for any applicable age criteria and relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates, along with the filled application form.
